case_title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL LLC VS. WINAI WONGSUWAN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-21-2007 CONTINUED TO MAR-14-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
